We Farewell IHU Graduates to Their Future Careers with the 5th Graduation Ceremony

24.06.2023

The 5th Graduation Ceremony was held on 24 June at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

Graduation Ceremony was held with the presence of the 30th Speaker of the Grand National Assembly of Türkiye Prof. Numan Kurtulmuş. Our undergraduate, graduate and doctorate graduates and their families attended the ceremony held at the Amphitheater in the Ibn Haldun University Complex, and a large group of guests followed the ceremony.

After his speech, Prof. Numan Kurtulmuş presented “Best Doctoral Thesis Award” to our graduate Linda Irinja Hyökki.

Our Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz and our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan also gave speeches at the ceremony.

At the Diploma Ceremony, Betül Bozkır, a graduate of Private Law LL.M. program, delivered a speech on behalf of the graduates, and Yılmaz Acar, a graduate of School of Islamic Studies Undergraduate Program, delivered a speech on behalf of the graduates.

The ceremony ended with the delivery of diplomas to the graduates and a cap throwing ritual.
